candidates.title: Localization content and runtime family
candidates.objective: Define engine-light localized-message identity, locale fallback, formatting inputs, content validation, and a thin Unity Localization adapter without coupling domain code to one renderer or engine.
source_requirements: Unicode locale, CLDR, ICU or MessageFormat standards and compatibility boundaries
Official Unity Localization documentation plus shipped-engine localization guidance
Plural, gender, fallback, bidirectional-text, font, accessibility, and content-pipeline evidence boundaries
candidates.exact_next_action: Run the positive-source gate and decide whether message identity, locale fallback, formatting, and renderer boundaries are stable enough to admit a Core and Unity blueprint.
